programme.title: The Lead With Jake Tapper
programme.desc: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.

programme.title: World Sport
programme.desc: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

programme.title: The Brief With Jim Sciutto
programme.desc: The best of CNN's reporting from correspondents across the world, to guide global audiences through the fast-paced news cycle with insight, analysis and hard-hitting interviews.

programme.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
programme.desc: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.sub-title: Betty White's Got an App for That
programme.desc: The boys travel to sunny California to install an animal-themed tank for Betty White. Next, they install a smartphone themed tank.

programme.title: Karishma Kudrat Ka
programme.desc: A man is murdered by another man who bears a striking resemblance to him. As the murderer takes over the victim's life, he plans to sell the unmarried sister of the deceased to a brothel for the money.

programme.title: Yeh Hai Judgement - Hang Till Death
programme.desc: Based on a true story about the life of Yakub Memon, an Indian citizen who was convicted for the involvement of the 1993 Bombay bombings.

programme.title: Kalyug Ka Pandav
programme.desc: Unable to unite with his lady love due to her family's dark secret, Ram sees a ray of hope when his brothers come up with a plan to solve their problems.

programme.title: Love Mocktail
programme.desc: Aadi meets young Adithi en route to Udupi. On their journey together, Aadi narrates the three different times he has been in love in life.

programme.title: Love Mocktail
programme.desc: Aadi meets young Adithi en route to Udupi. On their journey together, Aadi narrates the three different times he has been in love in life.

programme.title: Mera Karam Mera Dharam
programme.desc: Ajay Shankar Sharma and his mom, Shivani, live a poor lifestyle until one day when Shankar's maternal uncle, Deviprasad, comes to visit them and bequeaths a large estate and wealth for their well-being, on the condition that they improve their home-town Sundergarh, the responsibility of which lies on Deviprasad's son, Sarjuprasad. Ajay and his mom agree to do so.

programme.title: Pyar Ki Kahani
programme.desc: A man, working a simple job despite his qualifications, meets another man who is on the verge of suicide. Convincing him to stay alive and then move in with him, he helps him find a job, which in turn finds him a wife. When he himself finds what he thinks may be a suitable wife he sends a picture to his new-found friend for approval, but he reproaches him over his choice and is elusive in his reasons why.

programme.title: Insaniyat
programme.desc: An inspector feels certain that one man is involved in terrorism, but he does not have enough evidence to prove it. To do so, the inspector tries to unite two warring gang leaders.
